title: Seen canonical SemVer requirement v1
description: A canonical Seen v1 dependency requirement. The custom format also rejects comparator intervals whose lower bound is not strictly below the upper bound by SemVer precedence.

exact.description: A full canonical SemVer matched byte-for-byte, including optional prerelease and build metadata.

caret.description: A caret followed by a full SemVer without build metadata. The upper bound increments the leftmost nonzero core component, or patch when all components are zero.

tilde.description: A tilde followed by major.minor or a full SemVer without build metadata. The exclusive upper bound increments minor.

comparatorConjunction.description: Exactly one lower and one upper full-SemVer comparator in that order, separated by one ASCII space. Bounds exclude build metadata and must form a nonempty ascending interval.
